title: CV
text:
Here is my CV, which you can download here.
 Download CV

title: Hello!
text:
I am an ecophysiologist, interested in how physiology mediates the relationships between the environment and ecological and evolutionary processes in wild animals. My research is based on longitudinal data resulting from field observations and manipulations.
During my previous experiences, I developed a strong interest towards data analysis and computational approaches. You will learn more about some personal projects exploring such approach on this website.
Currently, I am looking for a postdoctoral position with the aim of investigating the relationships between proximate and ultimate processes by using mechanistic and computational approaches.
Learn more about my work on my research page!
You can also see my publications or softwares.

title: Publications
text:
Below, you’ll find a list of my publications. Feel free to also check out my Google Scholar, GitHub or ORCID profiles.
If you can’t access any of the articles, don’t hesitate to write me to get a copy!
